scripts.onnxtr-benchmark: SST_STAGE=production sst shell --config ../../sst.onnxtr-benchmark.config.ts --stage production tsx src/onnxtr-benchmark.ts
scripts.onnxtr-benchmark:preflight: ONNXTR_BENCHMARK_PREFLIGHT_ONLY=TRUE SST_STAGE=production sst shell --config ../../sst.onnxtr-benchmark.config.ts --stage production tsx src/onnxtr-benchmark.ts
scripts.test:onnxtr-benchmark: bun test src/onnxtr-benchmark-lib.test.ts src/onnxtr-benchmark-infra.test.ts src/onnxtr-benchmark-harness.test.ts src/onnxtr-promotion-infra.test.ts src/ecr-lifecycle-infra.test.ts
